props.message:
SPRAWL INDEX HALL

An alphabetised hall of header-scrolls. Each scroll declares the shape of one thing the Sprawl keeps. The shapes are dry. The shapes are dependable.

Pinned over the desk:

'Look up before you reach. Reach before you ask. Ask before you guess. Guess only when the realm is on fire.'

— posted by an Indexer who is no longer here.

root.speaker: Indexer Yera
root.text:
*she rubs her eyes. The candle is low. The desk is full of scrolls she has not got to today, and none she got to yesterday.*

Walker. Yes. What are you looking for? I can find it. It will take a moment. It will probably take more than a moment.

choices.label: How long have you been at this?

look.speaker: Indexer Yera
look.text:
Then look. There's a section on every shape the Sprawl knows. Most of them are correct. The ones that aren't, I will get to.

In the next breath, perhaps. Or the breath after.

And remember: we begin at zero. We do not apologise.

long.speaker: Indexer Yera
long.text:
*she actually laughs.*

Long enough that the answer doesn't help. Long enough that I have begun to remember the day I started, and the day I am supposed to finish, and the realm seems unconcerned about the difference between them.

Walk well, walker. Don't take up indexing.

bye.speaker: Indexer Yera
bye.text: Walk well. Don't knock the scrolls.
